architecture_summary: The paper introduces the dense prediction transformer (DPT), an encoder-decoder architecture that uses a vision transformer backbone, reassembles tokens from multiple transformer stages into image-like feature maps at multiple resolutions, and fuses them with a convolutional decoder for dense prediction.

benchmark_results.table_caption: Comparison to the state of the art on monocular depth estimation. We evaluate zero-shot cross-dataset transfer according to the protocol defined in [30]. Relative performance is computed with respect to the original MiDaS model [30]. Lower is better for all metrics.

novel_contributions: Introduce dense prediction transformer (DPT), a dense prediction architecture based on a vision transformer backbone
Reassemble tokens from multiple transformer stages into image-like representations at multiple resolutions
Show that DPT sets a new state of the art on ADE20K with 49.02% mIoU
Show that DPT sets a new state of the art on Pascal Context with 60.46 mIoU
Show that DPT improves monocular depth estimation by more than 28% relative performance over a state-of-the-art fully-convolutional network

key_claims.claim: DPT leverages a vision transformer backbone for dense prediction by reassembling tokens from multiple stages into image-like representations and fusing them with a convolutional decoder.
For monocular depth estimation, DPT improves relative performance by up to 28% compared to a state-of-the-art fully-convolutional network.
DPT sets a new state of the art on ADE20K with 49.02% mIoU.
DPT also sets the new state of the art on NYUv2, KITTI, and Pascal Context after fine-tuning on smaller datasets.
The architecture maintains constant token dimensionality and a global receptive field at every stage after the initial embedding.
On ADE20K validation, DPT-Hybrid achieves 49.02 mIoU, outperforming the listed convolutional baselines.
On Pascal Context validation, DPT-Hybrid achieves 60.46 mIoU.
DPT-Hybrid and DPT-Large have comparable latency to MiDaS while DPT-Large has 343 parameters [million] and DPT-Hybrid has 123 parameters [million].
